name: BRIDGFORD FOODS CORP
summary: Bridgford Foods Corporation, a California corporation organized in 1952, manufactures, markets, and distributes frozen and snack food products throughout the United States. Operating in two segments, the company produces biscuits, bread dough, roll dough items, dry sausage, salami, and beef jerky. It serves approximately 19,000 retail locations via direct-store-delivery and food service distributors, with snack foods representing 75% and frozen foods 25% of fiscal 2025 consolidated sales.
